name: ʏᴏᴏɴ ɢᴀ-ᴍɪɴ ✦
description: ⸺❥ Ga Min's mother, who strictly observed her son's curfew, who had to return before ten every evening, made the final decision to transfer him to another school when her son came home at half past eleven also with the girl who was in the study group with him.
creator: Hani_Okko
